description_long: This is a modern Lenovo laptop with a slim, rectangular profile and a matte black finish. The device features a full-sized keyboard with a numeric keypad, a large touchpad, and a widescreen display with a thin bezel. Several stickers are visible on the palm rest area, indicating hardware specifications and branding, while the Lenovo logo is present on the lower left corner. The laptop's ports are distributed along the sides, though only a few are visible in the angled views. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with some metallic and electronic components, giving it a lightweight yet sturdy feel. The screen is open and turned off, with no visible content displayed.
description: A slim, matte black Lenovo laptop with a full keyboard, numeric keypad, and visible hardware stickers on the palm rest. The screen is open and off, and the device features a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, numeric keypad, large touchpad, and stickers on the palm rest, with the screen open and off.
description_view_1: Left-side angled view highlighting the thin profile, keyboard depth, and partial visibility of side ports.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back edge of the laptop, with no visible details except the slim, flat surface.
description_view_3: Right-side angled view showing the keyboard, stickers, and some side ports, similar to the left-side view but from the opposite angle.
attribute_brand_logo: Lenovo logo on the lower left palm rest, rectangular silver label with 'Lenovo' text.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and off, with no visible content displayed.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a full function row and numeric keypad; standard English language keys.
attribute_sticker_placement: Multiple stickers on the right and left palm rest area, including a red and white sticker on the left and a silver sticker on the right, indicating hardware specifications and branding.
